section_miscategorizations.text: He denies any recent trauma or other medical issues.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is phrased as a review-of-systems/negative finding rather than part of the narrative chronology of the present illness. However, it does not substantially mislead the reader and is acceptable in HPI.

section_miscategorizations.text: He reports sleeping well and denies any recent chest pain episodes.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are more in the nature of general symptom review/negative findings than the core narrative of the current episode. Placement in HPI is still clinically understandable, so the issue is organizational rather than misleading.
